title: 2901 School Operations Assistant II /School/King Albert Park
description:
School name

Methodist Girls' School (Primary)

Contract period

  • Contract Period: From 1 Mar 2026 to 28 Feb 2027.
  • Option to Extend: 1 Mar 2027 to 29 Feb 2028.

Working hour

  • Work Hours (full day) - Total 42.5 hours per week (Both School Term and School Holidays).
  • During School Term (non-school holidays): Mondays to Fridays 6:30 am to 4:00 pm (9.5 hours per day), inclusive of 1-hr lunch break (Mondays to Fridays).
  • During School Holidays: Mondays to Fridays 7:00 am to 4:30 pm (9.5 hours per day), inclusive of 1-hr lunch break (Mondays to Fridays).
  • The personnel must be able to commit to the above work hours.
  • The work hours during the contract period are subject to changes by the school, so as to meet school operational needs and/or due to emergency situation.
  • Service is not generally required on Saturdays, Sundays and gazetted public holidays. If it is required, it should not exceed two (2) Saturdays a year.

Job scopes

The Services required are set out as follows:

School Operations Assistant II:

Reporting to the OM, the candidate will assist him in:

  • General cleaning, monitoring cleaning logistics and supervising other cleaners;
  • Able to clear rubbish to bin center;
  • Ensure cleanliness at school canteen and doing water high jet cleaning;
  • Marshalling traffic within the school;
  • Providing logistics support for school activities and functions;
  • Any other administration / operation duties assigned.

The personnel shall sign an Undertaking to safeguard official information.

Requirements

Qualification, Skill & Experience of the Contractor's Personnel

The Personnel should preferably have the following qualifications, skills and experience:

School Operations Assistant II:

  • Minimum two (2) years' experience in general cleaning, canteen and operations field; or equivalent;
  • Relevant work experience in canteen and operation with a school is advantageous;
  • Supervisory skills to manage cleaners;
  • Experience in marshalling traffic in school is advantageous.

postedCompany.description:
MaxhuntResource Pte Ltd specialize in identifying, sourcing, shortlisting, and interviewing candidates for jobs ( either permanent, temporary or contract staff ) within an organization.

•Our mission is to be a leader in the manpower placement service industry, providing efficient, cost effective and timely personal manpower solutions to our clients.

•Our philosophy is to provide total quality and service solutions. We recognize that people are the backbone of our business whether they be our clients, our applicants or our staffs.

•Our company goal is to gain recognition for our staffing solutions, to discover new opportunities for growth, to support customers’ work-life is our value. Aside from business, we also put great effort to contribute for a better society.
